title: ornithogalum umbellatum var. joannoni
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum var. joannoni, also known as Star of Bethlehem, is a bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Hyacinth family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum var. joannoni include relieving insomnia, anxiety, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
